faq.content: FAQ Q: How long does delivery take? A: After payment verification, delivery is automatic — usually under 30 minutes during business hours. Q: What about warranty? A: Most accounts include a 30-day replacement warranty. Contact support if anything stops working. Q: Can I get a refund? A: Refunds are considered case by case. We always attempt a replacement first. Q: Why does the payment amount have odd decimals? A: A unique identifier is added to each order for payment matching. Do not round the amount.
howtopay.content: How to Pay via Binance Pay 1. Open Binance → Pay → Send. 2. Enter the Binance Pay ID shown at checkout. 3. Send the exact amount (with unique decimals). 4. Take a screenshot of the successful transfer. 5. Tap "I've Paid" and upload the screenshot + Transaction ID. Verification is manual — usually within 30 minutes during business hours.
order.auto_cancelled: Order {code} was auto-cancelled — payment window expired. Stock has been released.

start.welcome:
Welcome, {name}.

This bot sells premium digital accounts.
Pick a product from the list or use the menu below.
support.admin_reply: Reply from support: {message} If your issue is resolved, tap the button below to close this ticket.
support.ask_photos: Description received. You may attach up to 3 photos as evidence (optional). Send photos one by one, or tap the button below to submit.
support.intro: Support Describe your issue below. An admin will reply here.
support.photo_added: Photo {count}/3 received. Send another or tap Submit.
support.received: Your message has been forwarded to support. We will reply shortly.
support.ticket_closed: Your ticket has been closed. Open a new one if you need further help.
terms.content: Terms of Service By using this bot you agree to: • Not share delivered credentials publicly. • Not change passwords on shared accounts. • Contact support before opening a dispute. • Respect the warranty period for replacements. All sales are final once delivered and outside warranty.
ticket.auto_closed: Ticket #{ticket_id} was automatically closed after 48 hours of inactivity. Open a new one if you still need help.
ticket.closed_cannot_reply: This ticket is closed. Open a new one via Support.
ticket.reply_sent: Reply sent. Admin will respond shortly.
wallet.topup_info: Contact support to top up your wallet.
web.credentials_hint: Keep these safe — they're only shown to you.
web.no_orders: No orders yet — your purchases will show up here.
web.referral_hint: Share your link — you earn commission when friends buy (see the bot for your balance).
web.cart_empty: Your cart is empty — browse the products.
web.catalog_empty: No products yet — check back soon.
web.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
web.hero_sub: Pay with QRIS or USDT — your credentials arrive right after payment.
web.login_hint: We use your Telegram account — no password needed.
web.usdt_note: USDT price is informational — pay in USDT via Binance, or in Rupiah.
web.discounts_at_checkout: Quantity deals & voucher codes are applied at checkout.
web.login_to_checkout: You'll sign in with Telegram at checkout — your cart comes along.
web.pay_method: How would you like to pay?
web.pay_idr_sub: Pay the exact Rupiah price. Confirmed automatically.
web.pay_usdt_sub: Pay the USDT amount shown next to the price. Confirmed automatically.
web.pay_method_unavailable: That payment method isn't available right now — pick another one.
web.binance_step_open: Open the Binance app and choose Pay → Transfer to Binance User (UID).
web.binance_step_note: Put this code in the transfer note:
web.binance_auto_note: We confirm your transfer automatically — this page updates by itself, no screenshots needed.
web.tokopay_auto_note: Scan the QR or open the payment page — this page updates by itself once you've paid.
web.pay_done_sub: Your credentials are ready in My orders.
web.pay_confirming: Payment received — finishing up your order…
web.pay_expired: This order's payment window has expired. Your items are still in stock — order again from your cart.
web.features_sub: Safe, fast, and pleasant digital shopping.
web.feat_instant_d: Products are delivered automatically within minutes of payment.
web.feat_warranty_d: Every product is covered — if something breaks, we fix it.
web.feat_support_d: Our team is ready any time via Telegram & WhatsApp.
web.feat_trusted_d: Trusted by thousands of customers with five-star reviews.
web.feat_verified_d: Every product is checked before it goes on sale.
web.testi_1: Activation worked within minutes of paying. Three months subscribed now, zero problems!
web.testi_2: All premium features genuinely active. Student-friendly prices, and any issue gets sorted right away.
web.testi_3: Tried several shops — this one is the most reliable. Stock always available, consistent prices, fast replies. Recommended!
web.testi_4: Had an activation hiccup once and it was fixed in under an hour. The warranty is real. I'll be back!
web.faq_sub: Answers to the questions we hear most often
web.faq_a1: Once payment is confirmed, the product is delivered to your account automatically. Product details (credentials, codes, etc.) appear on your order page.
web.faq_a2: Yes! Products are covered. If a product doesn't work or doesn't match its description, contact us and we'll fix it at no extra cost.
web.faq_a3: We accept QRIS and USDT. Every payment is verified automatically.
web.faq_a4: Usually 1–10 minutes after payment is confirmed. Cases that need a manual check take at most 1–2 hours during working hours.
web.faq_a5: Open a support ticket from your Account page, or reach us on Telegram / WhatsApp. Our team is on 24 hours a day.
web.contact_sub: We're here to help — pick whichever way is easiest
web.contact_ticket_sub: Open a ticket on the site
web.contact_hours: Online 24 hours, 7 days a week. Average response under an hour.
